title: Tabular Regression Demo
description: Demo task for contract-driven judging with CSV inputs and regression predictions. Non-final submissions upload predictions.csv. Final submissions upload inference code/model so the platform generates predictions before judging.

non_final.description: Upload a predictions.csv file with columns id,prediction. Each id must match one row in the current phase inputs.

final.description: Upload a ZIP containing infer.py plus model.json. The platform runs infer.py against the phase inputs asset to generate predictions.csv before judging.

evaluation.description: BTC uploads ground_truth.csv as asset key ground_truth and inputs.csv as asset key inputs for each public/private evaluation set.

task_assets.description: BTC uploads the shared task-level judge.py once. Public/private and normal/final phases all use this judge.
